criteria.description: File client/src/hooks/useTouchGestures.ts exists and exports a function useTouchGestures that accepts { onTap, onDoubleTap, onLongPress } as optional callbacks and returns an object with onTouchStart, onTouchEnd, onTouchMove, onTouchCancel properties
criteria.how_to_verify: Read the file; check the exported function signature and returned object keys
criteria.evidence: client/src/hooks/useTouchGestures.ts: lines 12-92 implement the hook and return the required handlers. It handles TAP, DOUBLE_TAP, and LONG_PRESS logic correctly using refs and timers.

criteria.description: UIState interface in client/src/lib/types.ts contains `objectDetailsOpen: boolean`
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep for 'objectDetailsOpen' in types.ts and confirm it is inside the UIState type block

criteria.description: EditorAction union in client/src/lib/types.ts contains both `{ type: 'OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS' }` and `{ type: 'CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS' }` variants
initialUIState in editor-context.tsx has `objectDetailsOpen: false`, and the reducer handles OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS, CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS, and clears objectDetailsOpen when SELECT_OBJECT payload is null
criteria.how_to_verify: Read editor-context.tsx; check initialUIState object and reducer switch cases for the three action types
criteria.evidence: client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx: initialUIState at line 38; reducer cases for SELECT_OBJECT (lines 156-160), OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS (line 169), and CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS (line 171). The corruption at the end of the file has been removed.

criteria.description: ObjectRenderer.tsx calls useTouchGestures and attaches touch handlers to the inner content div (the div with transform rotate style), with onTap dispatching SELECT_OBJECT, and onDoubleTap/onLongPress dispatching SELECT_OBJECT then OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS
criteria.how_to_verify: Read ObjectRenderer.tsx; confirm useTouchGestures import, hook call, and the inner div has onTouchStart/End/Move/Cancel from the hook
criteria.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx: lines 55-67 (hook call) and lines 151-155 (touch handlers attached to the content div with rotation transform).

criteria.description: ObjectRenderer.tsx rotation handle div has an onTouchStart handler that reads e.touches[0] coordinates and registers document touchmove/touchend listeners for rotation, mirroring the existing onMouseDown logic
criteria.how_to_verify: Read ObjectRenderer.tsx; confirm the rotation handle div at the -top-10 position has both onMouseDown and onTouchStart props
criteria.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx: handleRotationTouchStart implemented at lines 105-135 and attached to the rotation handle div at line 147.

criteria.description: MobileBottomBar.tsx mode state type is 'list' | 'edit' | 'details', a useEffect reacts to uiState.objectDetailsOpen to set mode to 'details', and when mode === 'details' the component renders PropertiesPanel
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileBottomBar.tsx; confirm the mode type literal, the useEffect watching objectDetailsOpen, and the JSX branch for mode === 'details'
criteria.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx: mode state updated (line 21), useEffect for mode transition (lines 27-35), and PropertiesPanel rendering in details mode (lines 160-164).

criteria.description: MobileBottomBar 'details' mode header has a back button that dispatches CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS (not SELECT_OBJECT null), so the user returns to 'edit' mode without losing the selection
criteria.how_to_verify: Read MobileBottomBar.tsx; in the details mode header, confirm the back button calls uiDispatch({ type: 'CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS' })
criteria.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx: handleBackToList at lines 37-43 dispatches CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS when in details mode. The button at line 64 uses this handler.

+**Implementation Report:**
+
+# Implementation Report — Iteration 2
+
+## Changes made
+- **Updated `initialUIState`**: Added `objectDetailsOpen: false` to the initial UI state in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx`.
+- **Updated `editorReducer`**: Added cases for `OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS` and `CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS` actions in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx`.
+- **Fixed `ObjectRenderer.tsx`**: 
+    - Added missing import for `useTouchGestures`.
+    - Verified that touch handlers are correctly attached to the object content div.
+    - Verified that rotation handle has `onTouchStart` handler mirroring `onMouseDown` logic.
+- **Refactored `MobileBottomBar.tsx`**:
+    - Fixed file corruption.
+    - Added support for `'details'` mode.
+    - Integrated `PropertiesPanel` for full object property editing on mobile.
+    - Added a "View Full Properties" button in `'edit'` mode for easier access.
+    - Ensured the back button correctly dispatches `CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS` when in details mode.
+
+## Files affected
+- MODIFIED: `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx`
+- MODIFIED: `client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx`
+- MODIFIED: `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx`
+
+## Deviations from plan
+None. Step 1 was skipped as `useTouchGestures.ts` was already correctly implemented.

+None.

+I have successfully implemented the improvements for mobile touch interaction.

+- **Enhanced touch gestures:** Integrated `useTouchGestures` hook into `ObjectRenderer.tsx`, enabling reliable tap, double-tap, and long-press interactions.
+- **Improved mobile UI flow:** Added `objectDetailsOpen` state to manage transitions between object selection and property editing on mobile.
+- **Mobile Property Editing:** Refactored `MobileBottomBar.tsx` to include a `'details'` mode that renders the `PropertiesPanel`, allowing full object metadata editing directly from the bottom bar.
+- **Stability:** Fixed corruption in `MobileBottomBar.tsx` and ensured all necessary imports and reducer cases are correctly wired.
+
+Mobile users can now open object properties by double-tapping or long-pressing an object, or by using the "View Full Properties" button in the bottom bar edit view.
